# Account Invoice Mode Monthly

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:52600346e8f5f4e9e58e0d69a085844038d18976a9a90b48994df8cabdcc3f74
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module allows to select a monthly invoicing mode for a customer.
It is based on `account_invoice_base_invoicing_mode`.
When this mode is selected for a customer, the customer will be automatically
invoiced

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Known issues / Roadmap

On the version 13.0 PR there is some discussion about changing how the
`_company_monthly_invoicing_today` works by storing the next invoicing day
to simplify the computation.
Would it be an improvment or not ?
I answered with this [comment](https://github.com/OCA/account-invoicing/pull/755#discussion_r625023369)

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/account-invoicing/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/account-invoicing/issues/new?body=module:%20account_invoice_mode_monthly%0Aversion:%2014.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_invoice_mode_monthly.models.sale_order.SaleOrder.cron_generate_monthly_invoices
documentation: Cron called daily to check if monthly invoicing needs to be done.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_invoice_mode_monthly.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._get_groupby_fields_for_monthly_invoicing
documentation: Returns the sale order fields used to group them into jobs.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_invoice_mode_monthly.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._company_monthly_invoicing_today
documentation: Get company ids for which today is monthly invoicing day.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_invoice_mode_monthly.tests.test_invoice_mode_monthly_is_it_today.TestInvoiceModeMonthly.test_late_invoicing_for_last_month
documentation: Check that last month invoicing will be done if missed.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_invoice_mode_monthly.tests.test_invoice_mode_monthly_is_it_today.TestInvoiceModeMonthly.test_selected_day_not_exist_in_month
documentation:
Check on last day of the month invoicing is done.

The day of invoicing selected could not exist in the current
month, but invoicing should still be executed on the last
day of the month.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_invoice_mode_monthly.tests.test_invoice_mode_monthly_is_it_today.TestInvoiceModeMonthly.test_no_invoicing_done_yet
documentation:
Check when is the first monthly invoicing done.

When monthly invoicing has never been done, it will not be run
for the previous month.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_invoice_mode_monthly.tests.test_invoice_mode_monthly.TestInvoiceModeMonthly.test_saleorder_with_different_mode_term
documentation: Check multiple sale order one partner diverse terms.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_invoice_mode_monthly.tests.test_invoice_mode_monthly.TestInvoiceModeMonthly.test_saleorder_grouped_in_invoice
documentation: Check multiple sale order grouped in one invoice

documentation: For same customer invoice 2 sales order separately.
